title: lithocarpus rufovillosus
intro: Lithocarpus rufovillosus, also known as the Red-barked Lithocarpus or Red-barked Bur, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rufovillosus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
